why_it_matters: The current low pain rating documents the migraine's clinical state today but has little impact on the stable-pattern management.
Utility insecurity is an actionable PRAPARE social need that should trigger resource referral and completes the SDOH picture already central to this visit.
Routine post-vaccination side-effect counseling is standard and its omission has negligible clinical consequence.
The PRAPARE stress rating supports the documented financial stress assessment but is a low-stakes detail given the narrative already captures it.
